description: §22.8 E-META-005 — phase-separation violation. `emit.raw(...)` is a compile-time-only API pattern; `meta.set(...)` is runtime-only. A single `^{}` block SHALL NOT reference both compile-time API patterns and runtime-only values (§22.8); the compiler rejects it with E-META-005. E-META-005 is the diagnostic of record; incidental codes ignored by superset matching.
